\tzpentry{ID3545}{Concept Units Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3545 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Gamma_{i\to f}=\frac{2\pi}{\hbar}\big|\langle f|V_{\rm int}|i\rangle\big|^2 \rho(E_f), \]
